title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. fastigiatum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. fastigiatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. fastigiatum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
